name: the dispatch falls back to native enforcement for an unadapted routed tool rather than a vacuous green
command: printf 'plain\n' > f.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file f.md --tools trivy 2>e.txt; grep -q 'tool=trivy verdict=not_enforced' e.txt && grep -q 'fallback=native' e.txt && grep -qE 'status=(green|red|incomplete)' e.txt && echo unadapted-native-fallback 1>&2
